channel.title: XKey Updates
channel.description: XKey - Vietnamese Input Method for macOS

item.title: Version 1.2.21 (Build 20260314)
item.description:
What's New

Redesign menu bar with NSPopover + SwiftUI, improve window rules UI layout

  • Replace NSMenu-based status bar with modern NSPopover containing SwiftUI view
  • Add new StatusBarPopoverView with glass design and toggle for Vietnamese input
  • Redesign WindowTitleRulesView with improved layout for multiple options display
  • Bump build version to 20260314

Xem chi tiết trên GitHub
